gbx_rst_asformat.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_asformat(tile, 'GTiff') as geotiff_tile FROM netcdf_rasters;

gbx_rst_avg.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_avg(tile) as band_averages, gbx_rst_avg(tile)[0] as band1_avg FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_bandmetadata.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_bandmetadata(tile, 1) as band1_metadata FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_boundingbox.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_boundingbox(tile) as bbox FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_clip.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_clip( tile, 'POLYGON((-122 37, -122 38, -121 38, -121 37, -122 37))', true ) as clipped FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_combineavg.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT region, gbx_rst_combineavg_agg(tile) as regional_average FROM rasters GROUP BY region;

gbx_rst_combineavg_agg.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT region, gbx_rst_combineavg_agg(tile) as regional_average FROM rasters GROUP BY region;

gbx_rst_convolve.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_convolve(tile, kernel) as filtered FROM rasters_with_kernels;

gbx_rst_derivedband.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT region, gbx_rst_derivedband_agg(tile, 'def f(a): return a', 'f') as result FROM rasters GROUP BY region;

gbx_rst_derivedband_agg.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT region, gbx_rst_derivedband_agg(tile, 'def f(a): return a', 'f') as result FROM rasters GROUP BY region;

gbx_rst_filter.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_filter(tile, 3, 'median') as denoised FROM noisy_rasters;

gbx_rst_format.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_format(tile) as format, COUNT(*) as count FROM rasters GROUP BY gbx_rst_format(tile);

gbx_rst_frombands.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_frombands(array(band1, band2, band3)) as multi_band FROM separated_bands;

gbx_rst_fromcontent.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_fromcontent(content, 'GTiff') as tile FROM binary_raster_table;

gbx_rst_fromfile.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT date_trunc('week', date) as week, gbx_rst_fromfile(path, 'GTiff') as tile FROM daily_rasters WHERE date >= '2024-01-01' ) SELECT week, gbx_rst_combineavg(collect_list(tile)) as weekly_composite FROM loaded_tiles GROUP BY week;

gbx_rst_georeference.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_georeference(tile) as georeference FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_getnodata.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_getnodata(tile) as nodata_values, gbx_rst_getnodata(tile)[0] as band1_nodata FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_getsubdataset.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_getsubdataset(tile, 'temperature') as temp_layer FROM netcdf_files;

gbx_rst_h3_rastertogridavg.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_h3_rastertogridavg(tile, 6) as h3_grid FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_h3_rastertogridcount.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_h3_rastertogridcount(tile, 5) as pixel_counts FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_h3_rastertogridmax.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT cell.cellID as h3_cell, cell.measure as max_value FROM rasters LATERAL VIEW explode(gbx_rst_h3_rastertogridmax(tile, 7)[0]) AS cell;

gbx_rst_h3_rastertogridmedian.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT cell.cellID as h3_cell, cell.measure as median_value FROM rasters LATERAL VIEW explode(gbx_rst_h3_rastertogridmedian(tile, 7)[0]) AS cell;

gbx_rst_h3_rastertogridmin.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT cell.cellID as h3_cell, cell.measure as min_value FROM rasters LATERAL VIEW explode(gbx_rst_h3_rastertogridmin(tile, 7)[0]) AS cell;

gbx_rst_h3_tessellate.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, h3_tile.cellid as h3_cell, h3_tile as tile, gbx_rst_avg(h3_tile) as avg_value FROM rasters LATERAL VIEW explode(gbx_rst_h3_tessellate(tile, 7)) AS h3_tile;

gbx_rst_height.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_height(tile) as height, gbx_rst_width(tile) as width FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_initnodata.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_initnodata(tile) as tile FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_isempty.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT * FROM rasters WHERE NOT gbx_rst_isempty(tile);

gbx_rst_maketiles.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, tile_subtile as tile FROM rasters LATERAL VIEW explode(gbx_rst_maketiles(tile, 512, 512)) AS tile_subtile;

gbx_rst_mapalgebra.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_mapalgebra( tiles, '{"calc": "A-B", "A_index": 0, "B_index": 1}' ) as difference FROM raster_arrays;

gbx_rst_max.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT date, MAX(gbx_rst_max(tile)[0]) as peak_temperature FROM daily_temps GROUP BY date ORDER BY date;

gbx_rst_median.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_avg(tile)[0] as mean_value, gbx_rst_median(tile)[0] as median_value, ABS(gbx_rst_avg(tile)[0] - gbx_rst_median(tile)[0]) as skewness FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_memsize.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_memsize(tile) as size_bytes FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_merge.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT scene_id, gbx_rst_merge_agg(tile) as merged_scene FROM satellite_tiles GROUP BY scene_id;

gbx_rst_merge_agg.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT scene_id, gbx_rst_merge_agg(tile) as merged_scene FROM satellite_tiles GROUP BY scene_id;

gbx_rst_metadata.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_metadata(tile) as metadata FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_min.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_min(tile)[0] as min_value, gbx_rst_max(tile)[0] as max_value, gbx_rst_max(tile)[0] - gbx_rst_min(tile)[0] as value_range FROM elevation_rasters;

gbx_rst_ndvi.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, date, gbx_rst_ndvi(tile, 4, 8) as ndvi_tile, gbx_rst_avg(gbx_rst_ndvi(tile, 4, 8))[0] as mean_ndvi FROM sentinel2_images;

gbx_rst_numbands.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_numbands(tile) as bands FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_pixelcount.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_pixelcount(tile) as pixel_count FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_pixelheight.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_pixelwidth(tile) as pixel_width, gbx_rst_pixelheight(tile) as pixel_height, gbx_rst_width(tile) * gbx_rst_pixelwidth(tile) as total_width_m FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_pixelwidth.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_pixelwidth(tile) as pixel_width, gbx_rst_pixelheight(tile) as pixel_height, gbx_rst_width(tile) * gbx_rst_pixelwidth(tile) as total_width_m FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_rastertoworldcoord.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_rastertoworldcoord(tile, 100, 200) as coords, gbx_rst_rastertoworldcoord(tile, 100, 200).x as longitude, gbx_rst_rastertoworldcoord(tile, 100, 200).y as latitude FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_rastertoworldcoordx.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_rastertoworldcoordx(tile, 100, 200) as easting FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_rastertoworldcoordy.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_rastertoworldcoordy(tile, 100, 200) as northing FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_retile.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, tile FROM rasters LATERAL VIEW explode(gbx_rst_retile(tile, 256, 256)) AS tile;

gbx_rst_rotation.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_rotation(tile) as rotation_rad FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_scalex.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_scalex(tile) as scale_x, gbx_rst_scaley(tile) as scale_y FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_scaley.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_scalex(tile) as scale_x, gbx_rst_scaley(tile) as scale_y FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_separatebands.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, bands[0] as red_band, bands[1] as green_band, bands[2] as blue_band FROM ( SELECT path, gbx_rst_separatebands(tile) as bands FROM rgb_rasters );

gbx_rst_skewx.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_skewx(tile) as skew_x, gbx_rst_skewy(tile) as skew_y FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_skewy.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_skewx(tile) as skew_x, gbx_rst_skewy(tile) as skew_y FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_srid.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_srid(tile) as srid FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_subdatasets.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_subdatasets(tile) as subdatasets FROM netcdf_rasters;

gbx_rst_summary.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_summary(tile) as summary FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_tooverlappingtiles.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, tile FROM rasters LATERAL VIEW explode(gbx_rst_tooverlappingtiles(tile, 256, 256, 10)) AS tile;

gbx_rst_transform.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_transform(tile, 4326) as wgs84_tile, gbx_rst_srid(gbx_rst_transform(tile, 4326)) as new_srid FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_tryopen.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT * FROM rasters WHERE gbx_rst_tryopen(tile) = true;

gbx_rst_type.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_type(tile) as band_types, gbx_rst_type(tile)[0] as band1_type FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_updatetype.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_updatetype(tile, 'Float32') as float_tile FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_upperleftx.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_upperleftx(tile) as upper_left_x, gbx_rst_upperlefty(tile) as upper_left_y FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_upperlefty.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT path, gbx_rst_upperleftx(tile) as upper_left_x, gbx_rst_upperlefty(tile) as upper_left_y FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_width.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_height(tile) as height, gbx_rst_width(tile) as width FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_worldtorastercoord.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT -122.4194 as lon, 37.7749 as lat UNION ALL SELECT -122.4183, 37.7745 ) SELECT l.lat, l.lon, gbx_rst_worldtorastercoord(r.tile, l.lon, l.lat) as pixel FROM rasters r, locations l;

gbx_rst_worldtorastercoordx.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_worldtorastercoordx(tile, -122.4194, 37.7749) as pixel_col FROM rasters;

gbx_rst_worldtorastercoordy.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_rst_worldtorastercoordy(tile, -122.4194, 37.7749) as pixel_row FROM rasters;

gbx_bng_cellarea.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT 'TQ3080' as cell, gbx_bng_cellarea('TQ3080') as area_km2 FROM locations;

gbx_bng_cellintersection.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT group_id, gbx_bng_cellintersection_agg(cell_id) as common_cell FROM observations GROUP BY group_id;

gbx_bng_cellintersection_agg.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT group_id, gbx_bng_cellintersection_agg(cell_id) as common_cell FROM observations GROUP BY group_id;

gbx_bng_cellunion.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT region, gbx_bng_cellunion_agg(cell_id) as bounding_cell FROM observations GROUP BY region;

gbx_bng_cellunion_agg.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT region, gbx_bng_cellunion_agg(cell_id) as bounding_cell FROM observations GROUP BY region;

gbx_bng_geomkloop.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_bng_geomkloop( st_geomfromtext('POLYGON((-0.1 51.5, -0.1 51.6, 0.0 51.6, 0.0 51.5, -0.1 51.5))'), 3, 1 ) as kloop_cells;

gbx_bng_geomkloopexplode.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_bng_geomkloopexplode( st_geomfromtext('POINT(-0.1278 51.5074)'), 3, 1 ) as cell;

gbx_bng_geomkring.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_bng_geomkring( st_geomfromtext('POLYGON((-0.1 51.5, -0.1 51.6, 0.0 51.6, 0.0 51.5, -0.1 51.5))'), 3, 1 ) as kring_cells;

gbx_bng_geomkringexplode.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_bng_geomkringexplode( st_geomfromtext('POINT(-0.1278 51.5074)'), 3, 1 ) as cell;

gbx_bng_kloop.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT cell_id, gbx_bng_kloop(cell_id, 2) as kloop_cells FROM locations;

gbx_bng_kloopexplode.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT center_cell, gbx_bng_kloopexplode(center_cell, 2) as ring_cell FROM (SELECT 'TQ3080' as center_cell);

gbx_bng_kring.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT cell_id, gbx_bng_kring(cell_id, 2) as nearby_cells FROM locations;

gbx_bng_kringexplode.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT center_cell, gbx_bng_kringexplode(center_cell, 2) as nearby_cell FROM (SELECT 'TQ3080' as center_cell);

gbx_bng_polyfill.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT region_name, gbx_bng_polyfill(boundary, 3) as cells FROM regions;

gbx_bng_tessellate.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_bng_tessellate( st_geomfromtext('POLYGON((-0.1 51.5, -0.1 51.6, 0.0 51.6, 0.0 51.5, -0.1 51.5))'), 3 ) as tessellation;

gbx_bng_tessellateexplode.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_bng_tessellateexplode( st_geomfromtext('POLYGON((-0.1 51.5, -0.1 51.6, 0.0 51.6, 0.0 51.5, -0.1 51.5))'), 3 ) as cell_info;

gbx_st_legacyaswkb.examples:
Examples:
      > SELECT gbx_st_legacyaswkb(geom_legacy) AS wkb FROM legacy_table;
